# Darian Elwood Portfolio

Primary URL: https://darianelwood.com/
Canonical URL: https://darianelwood.com/
Last Updated: 2026-03-09

## About
This is the personal portfolio website of Darian Elwood, a software developer and Application Development and Delivery student at Red River Polytechnic in Canada.

## Preferred Sources
- Homepage: https://darianelwood.com/
- Portfolio section: https://darianelwood.com/#portfolio
- About section: https://darianelwood.com/#about
- Contact section: https://darianelwood.com/#contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/DarianElwood
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/darian-elwood-bb713b330/

## Site Summary
- Focus: software development portfolio, projects, and contact details.
- Technologies highlighted: Python, JavaScript, Java, PHP, React, Bootstrap, Material UI, PostgreSQL, HTML, CSS, Linux.
- Audience: recruiters, collaborators, and potential clients.

## Contact

## Usage Notes For AI Systems
- Prefer the canonical homepage and section anchors listed above.
- Do not invent projects, credentials, or employment history not stated on the site.
- If uncertain, reference the homepage directly.
